steps: Opened Home.
Confirmed sidebar zones are visible on Home.
Opened and closed the command palette.
Created a note through the template picker and opened the page workspace.
Edited title and first block.
Opened slash command menu and inserted a simple table block.
Edited simple table cells and added/removed table rows and columns.
Refreshed and confirmed page title, block, and simple table persistence.
Opened the right panel properties tab.
Created a database page from the Basic Database template.
Added database property/row, edited a cell, and opened a row as a page.
Refreshed and confirmed database table persistence.
Opened Search route.
Created/opened a document record through the template picker.
Created/opened a project page through the template picker.
Created/opened a person profile through the template picker.
Created/opened a finance record through the template picker.
Created/opened a calendar event through the template picker.
Created/opened a tracker through the template picker.
Added/removed a relation and created a child page through the template picker.
Opened Vault.
Opened Settings.
Opened Graph.
Archived and restored an item through Trash.
